opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I went to get out of bed tonight and my shoulders and hips were locked solid. The pain is a deep, paralysing ache and I can't lift my arms above my chest.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It seized up badly after resting in a cold room and I'm frightened it's something in my spine.

symptom_narrative.onset: tonight after prolonged rest in a cold room
symptom_narrative.character: deep aching stiffness in the shoulders and hips (girdles)
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: paralysing, can't lift arms above chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse after rest/immobility and in the cold
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: both sides equally; no falls/trauma; no headache, no scalp tenderness, no jaw pain on chewing, no visual changes; hands/feet strength normal
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't dress or stand without arm assistance

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recent shoulder/hip girdle aches (borderline inflammation markers)

objective_data_offered.value: my grip and my feet/legs feel strong and normal; the trouble is lifting my arms and standing up because of the shoulder/hip pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report; cannot perform a formal neurological or temporal artery examination remotely
